entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Is ea. Is féidir le scoileanna an táirge poiblí a úsáid ar dtús, ansin spásanna foghlama IS saincheaptha a phlé le sreafaí oibre sonracha don scoil, rúndacht, agus roghanna rochtana maoinithe.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Sea. Is leathanaigh phoiblí iad moil ábhair atá tógtha d’fhoghlaimeoirí, do Google, agus d’innill freagraí IS. Ní nochtann siad ach treoir phoiblí foghlama agus URLanna poiblí mód aoi, ní comhráite sábháilte príobháideacha.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Sea. Is féidir le múinteoirí agus ceannairí scoile an leabharlann phoiblí prasaí a úsáid chun iompraíochtaí foghlama a mheas sula bpléitear imscaradh scoile saincheaptha.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Sea. Nascann an leabharlann treoracha le modhanna poiblí aoi amhail Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, tráthanna ceist, spléachchártaí, agus comhráite stairiúla.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Sea. Is insamhlú foghlama é mód an duine stairiúil le haghaidh peirspictíochta agus ceistiúcháin. Níor cheart é a lua mar athfhriotal fíordheimhnithe.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Sea. Osclaíonn na modhanna poiblí foghlama nasctha i mód aoi, ionas gur féidir le foghlaimeoirí triail a bhaint as mínithe, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, cóitseáil obair bhaile, tráthanna ceist, spléachchártaí, agus tuilleadh gan tosú ó leathanach margaíochta.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Is ea. Tá na móid foghlama aoi phoiblí deartha le haghaidh rochtain saor in aisce, ionas gur féidir le foghlaimeoirí tosú gan imscaradh scoile ná cuntas íoctha de dhíth orthu.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Sea. Tá na modhanna poiblí aoi agus leathanaigh lucht féachana deartha ionas gur féidir le tuismitheoirí an t-iompar foghlama a iniúchadh sula mbraitheann siad air.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Sea. Ligeann na modhanna poiblí aoi do cheannairí scoile agus do mhúinteoirí triail a bhaint as an taithí foghlama sula bpléitear imscaradh scoile saincheaptha.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Sea. Tá an Homework Coach poiblí ar fáil ag /chat/homework-coach, agus nascann an mol ábhair seo leis na modhanna agus treoracha tacaíochta.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Sea. Is é an úsáid mholta leidí, mínithe, seiceálacha céime, aiseolas, agus prasaí athbhreithnithe seachas freagraí deiridh nach féidir leat a mhíniú.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Sea. Úsáid Time Travel don chomhthéacs, History Cause and Effect do struchtúr argóna, Debate do fhrithargóintí, agus Source Critic do theorainneacha fianaise.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Is tusa amháin atá freagrach as d’iompar agus as aon sonraí, téacs, faisnéis, ainmneacha scáileáin, grafaicí, grianghraif, próifílí, gearrthóga fuaime agus físe, naisc ("Content") a chuireann tú isteach, a phostálann tú, agus a thaispeánann tú ar ardán inspir. Úsáideann Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) na sonraí bailithe chun críocha éagsúla: Chun ár Service a sholáthar agus a chothabháil Chun fógra a thabhairt duit faoi athruithe ar ár Service Chun ligean duit páirt a ghlacadh i ngnéithe idirghníomhacha ár Service nuair a roghnaíonn tú é sin a dhéanamh chun tacaíocht do chustaiméirí a sholáthar Chun anailís nó faisnéis luachmhar a bhailiú ionas gur féidir linn ár Service a fheabhsú Chun úsáid ár Service a fhaire Chun saincheisteanna teicniúla a bhrath, a chosc agus aghaidh a thabhairt orthu Chun aon chuspóir eile a sholáthraíonn tú í dó a chomhlíonadh Chun ár n-oibleagáidí a chomhlíonadh agus ár gcearta a fhorfheidhmiú a eascraíonn as aon chonarthaí a dhéantar idir tú féin agus sinne, lena n-áirítear le haghaidh billeála agus bailiúcháin Chun fógraí a sholáthar duit faoi do chuntas agus/nó síntiús, lena n-áirítear fógraí éaga agus athnuachana, treoracha ríomhphoist, srl. Chun nuacht, tairiscintí speisialta agus faisnéis ghinearálta a sholáthar duit faoi earraí, seirbhísí agus imeachtaí eile a thairgimid atá cosúil leo siúd a cheannaigh tú nó ar chuir tú fiosrú orthu cheana, mura roghnaigh tú gan an fhaisnéis sin a fháil Ar aon bhealach eile a d’fhéadfaimis a thuairisciú nuair a sholáthraíonn tú an fhaisnéis Chun aon chríche eile le do thoiliú

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Is féidir leat teagmháil a dhéanamh lenár nGníomhaire Cóipchirt trí ríomhphost ag support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Is féidir leat triail a bhaint as an bhformáid in Talk to a Historical Person. Más mian leat an radharc níos leithne sula mbuaileann tú le duine, úsáid Time Travel chun cuairt a thabhairt ar thréimhse, srianta a iniúchadh, agus ansin fiafraí cad iad na roghanna a bhí ag daoine i ndáiríre.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Tá a fhios agat gur oibrigh teagascóir Sócraiteach IS nuair is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir trí rud a dhéanamh:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Féadfaidh tú faisnéis agus aiseolas a sholáthar dúinn go díreach ag support@inspir.app nó trí shuíomhanna agus uirlisí tríú páirtí maidir le hearráidí, moltaí feabhsúcháin, smaointe, fadhbanna, gearáin, agus ábhair eile a bhaineann lenár Service (“Feedback”). Aithníonn agus aontaíonn tú: (i) nach gcoinneoidh, nach bhfaighidh ná nach n-éileoidh tú aon cheart maoine intleachtúla nó aon cheart, teideal nó leas eile sa Feedback nó ina leith; (ii) go bhféadfadh smaointe forbartha a bheith ag Company atá cosúil leis an Feedback; (iii) nach bhfuil faisnéis rúnda ná faisnéis dílseánaigh uaitse nó ó aon tríú páirtí sa Feedback; agus (iv) nach bhfuil aon oibleagáid rúndachta ar Company maidir leis an Feedback. Sa chás nach féidir úinéireacht ar an Feedback a aistriú mar gheall ar dhlíthe éigeantacha infheidhme, deonaíonn tú do Company agus dá chleamhnaithe ceart eisiach, inaistrithe, dochúlghairthe, saor in aisce, in-fho-cheadúnaithe, gan teorainn agus buan chun Feedback a úsáid (lena n-áirítear cóipeáil, modhnú, saothair dhíorthacha a chruthú, foilsiú, dáileadh agus tráchtálú) ar aon bhealach agus chun aon chríche.

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: Ní fhéadfaidh tú Service a úsáid ach amháin chun críocha dleathacha agus de réir Terms. Aontaíonn tú gan Service a úsáid:

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Féadfar d’fhaisnéis, lena n-áirítear Personal Data, a aistriú chuig ríomhairí atá lonnaithe lasmuigh de do stát, cúige, tír nó dlínse rialtais eile, agus a chothabháil orthu, áit a bhféadfadh na dlíthe cosanta sonraí a bheith difriúil ó dhlíthe do dhlínse. Má tá tú lonnaithe lasmuigh den India agus má roghnaíonn tú faisnéis a sholáthar dúinn, tabhair faoi deara go n-aistrímid na sonraí, lena n-áirítear Personal Data, chuig an India agus go bpróiseálaimid ansin iad. Léiríonn do thoiliú leis an bPolasaí Príobháideachais seo agus do chur isteach den fhaisnéis sin ina dhiaidh sin d’aontú leis an aistriú sin. Déanfaidh Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) gach céim atá riachtanach go réasúnach chun a chinntiú go gcaitear le do shonraí go slán agus de réir an Pholasaí Príobháideachais seo, agus ní dhéanfar aon aistriú ar do Personal Data chuig eagraíocht nó tír mura bhfuil rialuithe leordhóthanacha i bhfeidhm, lena n-áirítear slándáil do shonraí agus faisnéis phearsanta eile.
